---
name: go-check
description: >-
  Run a comprehensive Go project health check. Execute these in parallel
---

<!-- GENERATED BY hg-global-skill-sync.sh FROM ~/.claude/commands/go-check.md; DO NOT EDIT -->

Run a comprehensive Go project health check. Execute these in parallel:

1. `go build ./...` — compilation check
2. `go vet ./...` — static analysis
3. `go test ./... -count=1 -race` — tests with race detector
4. `golangci-lint run ./...` — linting (if installed, skip if not)

If a Makefile exists with a `check` or `lint` target, mention it but still run the above.
Summarize pass/fail for each step. Flag any failures that need attention.
